sections.paragraph: διάνοια, ας, ἡ [διά, νοῦς] ‘mental process relating to option(s) for behavior’, with focus on intention or purpose, mindset, mind, disposition, understanding (context determines whether the mental process is good or bad) Mk 12:30; Lk 1:51; 10:27; Eph 4:18; Hb 8:10; 10:16; 1 Pt 1:13; 2 Pt 3:1; impulse Eph 2:3; perception, insight 1 J 5:20; ἐχϑροὶ τῇ διανοίᾳ of hostile disposition Col 1:21.
